No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to ending hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops data analysis skills relevant for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 具備資料統整與分析的知能

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops data integration and analysis skills, highly relevant for productive employment and decent work in various fields (Target 8.5).
evidence: 具備資料統整與分析的知能

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course teaches statistical methods, causal inference, and data analysis, enhancing scientific research and innovation (Target 9.5).
evidence: 具備資料統整與分析的知能

Reduced Inequalities.reason: While data analysis can inform inequality studies, the syllabus does not specify this application.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to marine ecosystems.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course provides data analysis and inference skills for policy planning, supporting evidence-based policy-making and effective institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: 具備國家政策規劃與比較的知能

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly supports statistical capacity-building (Target 17.19) and enhances the ability to work with high-quality, reliable data (Target 17.18).
evidence: 具備資料統整與分析的知能
